name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual transaction processing causes late reports. We automate report generation instead of manual bookkeeping and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Manual processing of financial transactions leads to errors and delays.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual processing of financial transactions leads to errors and delays.
